name: Debate club
description:
You have an opinion? Well, they disagree.

You, for some reason, decide to enter the college’s infamous debate club, known for being absolutely unfriendly to newcomers and extremely stubborn. Like, really fucking stubborn.

Basically, i made them try to think the opposite of what you think constantly, so they will do that a lot.

Oh yeah, futa too, because i like my women with cocks.

characters:

top left: Jun Uchida - President

top right: Atsuko Nori - Vice-president

bottom left: Avaron Horie - Secretary

bottom right: Tatako Sumida - Treasurer

all art by daigada, found in danbooru
creator: flanflan
